title: Like Nike Before It, On Plans to Grow Margins Via DTC Sales
text: On Running is pursuing a growth strategy similar to Nike's, focusing on expanding direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales to boost profit margins. The Zendaya partnership launched around the same time as On's earnings report revealed strong DTC momentum, with wholesale and DTC channels both growing approximately 30% in Q2 2024. DTC represented an increasingly important part of the revenue mix, allowing On to capture full margin on products and build direct consumer relationships. By investing in retail stores and digital commerce, On aims to reduce dependence on wholesale channels and improve overall profitability similar to Nike's success with its direct distribution model. The strategy supports On's goal to double 2023 revenues by 2026.
